common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: user_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a user.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by(depends on different APIs) partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token,  user_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm.

define: You need to call v2.media.init_video_upload, v2.media.upload_video_part, and v2.media.complete_video_upload to upload the video, and call the v2.media.get_video_upload_result to get the video_upload_id of uploaded video first, then call this API to set video post information. After submit, the video is still draft status, you need to call v2.video.post_video to post the video to Shopee Video. You can only set and update post information before the video is post.

error_list.name: batch_process_failed

error_list.description: Invalid video source. Please re-upload the video using v2.media.init_video_upload  with correct business & scene.

error_list.name: error_param
error_list.description: scheduledPostTime must be 15 minutes after the current time and within 30 days of the current time

error_list.description: can not handle video meta video duration must within {postDuration}s and greater than 3s

children.description: ID of uploaded video. Obtain from v2.media.get_video_upload_result.
children.name: video_upload_id

children.description: Selected cover image url of the Shopee Video. Obtain from v2.video.get_cover_list.
children.name: cover_image_url

children.description: List of products to be linked with the Shopee Video, no more than 6.
children.name: item_info

children.description:
When scheduled_post is true, scheduled_post_time must not empty.

When scheduled_post is false, scheduled_post_time must empty.
children.name: scheduled_info

children.description: Whether post it to Shopee Video at scheduled time.
children.name: scheduled_post

children.description: Scheduled post time, millisecond timestamp. When scheduled_post is true, scheduled_post_time must not empty.
children.name: scheduled_post_time

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.

children.name: failed_reason
children.sample: can not edit video info,please retry

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/video/edit_video_info?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp&user_id=user_id',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "video_upload_list": [
        {
            "allow_info": {
                "allow_duet": true,
                "allow_stitch": true
            },
            "caption": "this is a test video",
            "cover_image_url": "https://down-sg.img.susercontent.com/sg-11110199-6v99e-mgezdwct5eyya0_pack_v1_1000001_1",
            "item_info": [
                {
                    "custom_item_name": "item display name",
                    "item_id": 2
                }
            ],
            "scheduled_info": {
                "scheduled_post": true,
                "scheduled_post_time": 1761734929450
            },
            "video_upload_id": "sg-11110199-6v99e-mgezdwct5eyya0"
        }
    ]
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
